remarks: 6th-floor 2BR condo * Private balcony with city views * Elevator building with pool + gym * 24-hour security * Assigned parking * On-site laundry * Minutes to Downtown Stamford * 1.5 mi to Metro North & Amtrak trains. Set in the Mid-City Stamford, this bright, condo at 91 Strawberry Hill Ave. offers a flexible open living and dining layout with an oversized window that brings in natural light. Step onto your private balcony to take in sweeping skyline views and enjoy easy indoor-outdoor living. The kitchen is efficient and ready for everyday cooking with stainless steel appliances. Two generously sized bedrooms provide comfortable space for sleep, work, or guests, with ample closet storage. Residents enjoy elevator access plus community amenities including a pool, fitness center, play ground, 24-hour security, and an on-site laundry room. Unit comes with a storage unit in the basement. Convenient to Downtown Stamford restaurants, shopping, parks, recreation & medical facilities. HOA include heat, hot water, water, security guard, 1 assigned parking space and all shared facilities. PET FRIENDLY.
